inputs.label: Buy Price
inputs.businessContext: The price per unit at which the asset is purchased.

businessContext_i18n.en: The price per unit at which the asset is purchased.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Varlığın birim başına satın alma fiyatı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der Preis pro Einheit, zu dem das Asset gekauft wird.

inputs.label: Sell Price
inputs.businessContext: The price per unit at which the asset is sold.

businessContext_i18n.en: The price per unit at which the asset is sold.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der Preis pro Einheit, zu dem das Asset verkauft wird.

inputs.label: Quantity
inputs.businessContext: The number of units traded in the arbitrage transaction.

businessContext_i18n.en: The number of units traded in the arbitrage transaction.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Arbitraj işleminde işlem gören birim sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Anzahl der gehandelten Einheiten in der Arbitrage-Transaktion.

inputs.label: Buy Transaction Fee
inputs.businessContext: Fixed fee incurred when buying the asset.

businessContext_i18n.en: Fixed fee incurred when buying the asset.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Varlığı satın alırken oluşan sabit ücret.
businessContext_i18n.de: Feste Gebühr beim Kauf des Assets.

inputs.label: Sell Transaction Fee
inputs.businessContext: Fixed fee incurred when selling the asset.

businessContext_i18n.en: Fixed fee incurred when selling the asset.
businessContext_i18n.de: Feste Gebühr beim Verkauf des Vermögenswerts.
